narrative:
Westerville 2-B (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,216 registered voters, with 49.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.5%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.4 percentage points.
